title: East River
content:
Dour river
    Jaded with monotony of lights
    Diving off mast heads....
    Lights mad with creating in a river... turning its sullen back...
    Heave up, river...
    Vomit back into the darkness your spawn of light....
    The night will gut what you give her.
meaning:
Lola Ridge's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "East River"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
